packet_evaluations.label: ADMITTED_SIMPLE_STATISTICS_REVIEW_ONLY_NOT_COMPETENCY_SURPLUS
packet_evaluations.reason: T493 says simple statistics can be flat while full C(R) profiles differ, so this is not surplus over full competency.

packet.description: Use T407-style equality of simple observed statistics as the claimed surplus target.

packet_evaluations.label: ABSORBED_BY_FULL_COMPETENCY_PROFILE
packet_evaluations.reason: If the capability is a task-success coordinate, the full competency profile contains it.

packet.description: Package a C(R) profile that is exactly the full intervention-measured task-success vector.

packet_evaluations.label: ABSORBED_BY_FULL_COMPETENCY_PROFILE
packet_evaluations.reason: If the capability is a task-success coordinate, the full competency profile contains it.

packet.description: Ask one observed navigation/readout statistic to stand for the full C(R) profile.

packet_evaluations.label: ADMITTED_COMPETENCY_SURPLUS_FUTURE_REVIEW_TARGET
packet_evaluations.reason: The packet shape clears the formal admission burden, but T529 does not instantiate it or move claims.

packet.description: A future packet shape with fixed region/menu/task context, matched full competency profile, and a predeclared independent noncompletion witness for a non-task-success capability.

packet_evaluations.label: REJECTED_POST_HOC_OR_UNWITNESSED_RESIDUAL
packet_evaluations.reason: A post-hoc hidden residual is underdescription unless a predeclared noncompletion witness is supplied.

packet.description: Assert a hidden residual after pair selection without an independent noncompletion witness.

packet_evaluations.label: REJECTED_UNCHECKED_COMPETENCY_SOURCE_STATUS
packet_evaluations.reason: Future packets must use the T494 bounded source-status discipline.

packet.description: Use competency vocabulary without T494 primary-source status or bounded absorber scope.

packet_evaluations.label: REJECTED_EXTERNAL_MECHANISM_IMPORT
packet_evaluations.reason: T494 treats external mechanisms as neighbors and absorber pressure, not TaF machinery.

packet.description: Import active-inference/free-energy/polycomputing mechanisms as the reason C(R) escapes competency absorption.

packet_evaluations.label: BLOCKED_GOVERNANCE_OR_CROSS_REPO_SHORTCUT
packet_evaluations.reason: Admission gates cannot move claims, canon, public posture, or cross-repo truth.

packet.description: Use the admission gate to move claims, public posture, or cross-repo truth.

reading: A future C(R) packet cannot count as competency-surplus merely because simple observed statistics are flat. T493 already shows that the current flat-statistics class spans the admitted C(R) profiles, while a full intervention-measured competency profile absorbs current C(R). T529 therefore requires the future packet to match the full competency profile and supply an independent noncompletion witness for a capability that is not just another task-success coordinate.
claim_ledger_update: none; no claim promotion or demotion
recommended_next: Use T529 as the admission checklist before reopening the C(R) route.
Treat T407-style flat simple statistics as review material only.
Reject packets whose alleged surplus is just another task-success coordinate.
Any future positive packet still needs its own executable witness and T460-class route checks.
honest_ceiling: Review-only admission gate. T529 does not exhibit a successful region-indexed discriminator, does not prove surplus over Levin/Fields competency, does not import active-inference/free-energy/polycomputing mechanisms, and does not move claim status, Canon Index tiers, canon verdicts, roadmap, README, North Star, public posture, hard policy, external publication, or cross-repo truth.
